name: Disk Wiper Activity
description: Detects indicators of disk wiping tools or MBR/boot sector modifications
query:
// Disk Wiper Detection
// MBR/boot sector access or known wipers
events from endpoint
where file_path contains "\\.\" and file_path contains "PhysicalDrive"
  or process_name in ("dd", "shred", "wipe")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
